---
title: "Courses"
---

## Undergraduate Courses

- [ESC 2000: Introduction to Earth Science](courses/esc2000.qmd)
- [GEO 3210: Geomorphology](courses/geo3210.qmd)
- [GEO 3210L: Geomorphology Lab](courses/geo3210lab.qmd)
- [GEO 4221: Coastal Morphology](courses/geo4221.qmd)
- [GEO 4221L: Coastal Morphology Lab](courses/geo4221lab.qmd)
- [GEO 4214: Aeolian Geomorphology](courses/geo4214.qmd)

## Graduate Courses

- [GEO 5225: Coastal Morphology](courses/geo5225.qmd)
- [GEO 5225L: Coastal Morphology Lab](courses/geo5225lab.qmd)
- [GEO 5216: Aeolian Geomorphology](courses/geo5216.qmd)
- [GEO 6118](courses/geo6118.qmd)
